notes: Game crashes with an error as soon as I click on "PLAY".
title: Fighting Fantasy Classics

notes:
At the time of this report the  game works *only* with Proton 3.7-8 (other versions like 3.16-7 => crash)
No other launch flag needed.
title: Fighting Fantasy Classics

notes: The game was crashing with an error as soon as I clicked on "PLAY", but worked after I set the following launch options: "PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command%".
title: Fighting Fantasy Classics

notes:
Initial attempts had the game "start" and Steam saying the game was running, but no window ever opened. I let it sit "running" for at least 15 minutes the first time, but it never quit on its own. Had to kill the processes:

    kill -9 $(ps aux | grep -i "[f]ighting" | awk '{ print $2 }')

I tried some other things first based on comments here and elsewhere with no luck, at least not until I got to the earliest two reviews here. Nuked all of the other changes I tried and then disabled D3D11. Started straight up after that and everything seems to be working fine.
title: Fighting Fantasy Classics
